egress_attempts: for t in curl wget aria2c axel http; do which $t 2>/dev/null && $t --version 2>/dev/null | head -1; done; echo "---curl config test---"; printf 'header = "X-Test: abc"\nuser-agent = "yt"\n' | curl --c
command -v curl wget aria2c axel http 2>/dev/null; echo "done"

cd /tmp
# Test curl reads cookie+header from a config file (not argv)
printf '%s\n' '--cookie "test=ytdlp"' '--header "X-Secret: abc123"' '--user-agent "yt-dlp"' > /tmp/curlcfg
curl --config /tmp/curl

printf '%s\n' 'header = X-Secret: abc123' 'user_agent = yt-dlp-test' > /tmp/wgetrc_test; wget --config=/tmp/wgetrc_test --debug --tries=1 --timeout=1 -O /dev/null http://127.0.0.1:1/ 2>&1 | grep -iE "
man curl 2>/dev/null | col -b | grep -A3 -iE "^\s*-b, --cookie" | head -12 || curl --help all 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "\-b, --cookie|--cookie " | head
